noRecentVisiteService: No recent visit service, please view
bkdevopsDesc: BK-CI（BlueKing Continuous Integration） is a free and open source CI service. The visual UI orchestration pipeline can help you easily automate the build-test-release workflow and deliver your products continuously, quickly and with few bugs.
bkdevopsWay: Continous delivery stresses faster and more reliable automation software delivery with low costs，pipeline provides visualization, one-click delopyment service, continous seamless integration and support parallel deployment
leaveConfirmMsg: You will lose your edited data if you leave

accessDeny.title: No access to this project
accessDeny.desc: You are not a project member, or the project does not exist, please apply for permission or switch projects
accessDeny.projectBanDesc: Project banned, please switch the project or restart

recommendationLabel: Google chrome is recommended for the best viewing experience

exception.goBack: Go back to Devops home page

quickStart.projectDescription: Project is the largest unit of resources, and resources between different projects are invisible from each other.
quickStart.settintTitleDesc: You can select a Demo code library from the BK DevOps platform to configure your own delivery pipeline quickly
quickStart.approvalingTips: Your project is under review, we will complete the review within 24 hours, for rush service please contact
quickStart.pipelineStepDesc: We have provided various pipeline packages based on different code library projects，now SVN, Git library and blue whale Gitlab library of Code platform are supported
quickStart.previewTips: We recommend the following pipeline for continous delivery based on the code library you selected
quickStart.completeTips: You have created a delivery pipeline successfully uder [{projectName}]

waitforReview: Pending review, no access to operate
disableProjectTips: You have {disableProjectNum} disabled projects，please click "display disabled project" or create project on the upper-right corner
name: Name
outofCollectionTips: Clear unused service to add new ones：）
scanToDownload: Scan to download BK DevOps App
noLogoTips: Please select the photo to be uploaded
projectNamePlaceholder: Please enter project name in 1-32 characters
projectEnglishNamePlaceholder: Please enter lower-case letters, numbers and strikes in 2-32 characters, start with lower-case letters
notFindProjectTips: You can create your own project and conduct user and access management accordingly, you can also apply for existed project
questionTips: If you have any question please contact
permissionRefreshtitle: Permission Request form has been submitted
permissionRefreshSubtitle: Please fill in the permission request form in the permission center and refresh the page after submission
applySuccess: Application succeeded, please wait for approval
fillReason: Please fill in the application reason
projectCreatingDesc: The {0} project is being created and approved, please wait patiently
websocketInterupt: Websocket connection interrupted, cannot automatically obtain the current pipeline running status. Reconnect?
项目尚未关联运营产品，启用失败，请先关联所属运营产品再启用项目。: The project has not been associated with an operational product yet, activation failed. Please associate it with the corresponding operational product before enabling the project.
确定停用项目吗？: Are you sure you want to disable the project?
停用项目后，系统将定期清理已停用项目下流水线产生的构建日志、制品、报告。请备份需: After disabling the project, the system will regularly clean up the build logs, artifacts, and reports generated by the pipelines under the disabled project. Please back up the necessary data before disabling!
检测到您尚未将蓝盾项目关联运营产品，将影响正常使用，请立即前往关联。: It has been detected that you have not yet associated your Blue Shield project with operational products, which will affect normal use. Please go associate it immediately.
undeployTitle: The {0} service has not been deployed yet
turboServiceDesc: Turbo compilation acceleration service is based on distributed compilation, caching, and container technologies. It aims to provide efficient, stable, and convenient acceleration services for businesses, thereby improving development efficiency. To use this feature, the acceleration service needs to be deployed.
检测到X项权限/授权不能直接退出，请先清理资源、或在下方填写交接人移交给新负责人: Detected {0} permissions/authorizations that cannot be exited directly. Please clear resources first, or fill in the handover person below to transfer to a new person in charge.
可以批量交接给交接人，交接人同意后，将成功退出项目: Can be batch handed over to the handover person, and will successfully exit the project after the handover person agrees
存在通过组织架构: There are resources obtained through the organizational structure
获得权限的资源，无法直接退出。请联系项目管理员: , which cannot be exited directly. Please contact the project administrator
，评估按照组织架构添加权限是否合理。: ,to evaluate whether adding permissions according to the organizational structure is reasonable.
退出时，将清理你在此项目下获得的权限，确认退出吗？: Upon exit, your permissions obtained under this project will be cleared. Are you sure you want to exit?
已成功提交「移交权限」申请，等待交接人确认。: Successfully submitted 'handover permissions' application, waiting for the handover person to confirm.
输入交接人，选中回车进行校验: Enter the handover person, and press enter to validate
存在需清理或交接的权限/授权: There are permissions/authorizations that need to be cleared or handed over
disclosureTitle: {0} The project information is highly confidential. You have not signed the NDA and cannot access this site. Please scan the QR code to sign the agreement:
noticeTitle: Please note the following instructions (very important):
disclosureTip0: After signing, strictly comply with confidentiality obligations. It is prohibited to disclose any information related to {0} to third parties in any way (including but not limited to photography, screenshots, written descriptions, verbal accounts, etc.)
disclosureTip1: In case of information leakage, we will conduct thorough investigation and impose severe penalties. The leaker (both company and individual) will face criminal charges, compensation for breach of NDA, and other punitive measures.
